_readme: Hand-curated dated catalysts for the Terminal calendar. APPEND RULES for the 15:00 content shift: only add a row when the date is verified in a primary source (company IR press release, SEC filing, Federal Register) or one of Quinn's published posts; a date you cannot verify STAYS OUT (blank beats fake). Aggregator 'expected' earnings dates are ESTIMATES, not dates. Fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD, required), t (ticker, may be empty for market-wide events), what (required, short), why (one line, Quinn's voice, no em dashes), receipt (URL to the post, filing, or press release that grounds it). Earnings dates come from the machine's calendar automatically; only add an earnings row here if you have a WHY worth reading. KNOWN GAPS to fill when verifiable: MU FQ4 earnings date (NOT announced as of 2026-07-20 per investors.micron.com; aggregators guess late Sept, unverified, STAYS OUT until Micron's press release), NVDA Q2 FY27 date (not company-confirmed yet), RKLB / ASTS / CRDO / NBIS dates (aggregator estimates only).

catalysts.why: The contrarian Chemours case leans on PFAS rules landing survivable. Both dockets shut today, the rescission rule and the PFOA PFOS deadline extension, and the agency goes quiet to write the finals.
Founding members lock $99 a year for life before the price goes to $200. The Terminal becomes a member perk.
The glass-substrate drilling thesis gets its first print since the badge went STRESSED. Guidance on packaging demand is the tell.
First print since the re-entry. The pivot story either shows up in the numbers or it does not.
Royalty rates against a softening handset tape. The licensing pipeline is the number that moves the physical-layer names downstream.
Vertiv is the purest read on data center buildout pace. Orders and backlog here set the tone for every cooling and power name on the book.
The MI-series ramp is the second source story for AI compute. Data center segment growth is the only line that matters.
The networking layer's report card. AI backend wins versus white box pressure decides whether the premium multiple holds.
The fiber turnaround print. PCF deal flow and debt progress are what keep the position thesis alive.
Precision timing rides every AI networking box. Watch the comms and datacenter split for confirmation the design wins are converting.
Software attach rate on the lidar base is the whole story now. Gross margin trajectory tells you if the physical AI thesis is compounding.
The nuclear-to-datacenter power story reports. New PPA announcements move the whole power layer.

catalysts.what: IPO lockup expires, 90 days from prospectus
catalysts.why: The 424B4 sets a 90 day restricted period from the July 9 prospectus. Company shares come unlocked here; the memory supercycle thesis meets its first real supply test.

catalysts.what: EPA PFAS rescission final rule window opens
catalysts.why: EPA's own Unified Agenda targets September 2026 for the final rescission rule. A target, not a promise, but it is the only future date the agency has put on paper for the Chemours overhang.
